prompt:
Corner Pharmacy's refill planner is scheduling pickups for days we are closed. We are closed every Sunday. Holiday closures work — the Christmas-window fills rolled to the next day exactly like they should — but any refill whose ready date lands on a Sunday prints a "ready Sunday" pickup slip, and the robocall reminder then goes out Saturday evening for a pickup that cannot happen. Worse, multi-refill schedules drift: after any Sunday in the chain, every later pickup in the schedule sits a day earlier than it should, so 90-day patients end up compounding the error. Our lead tech swears the Sunday rule is implemented because she read the planner and the closed-Sundays handling is right there next to the holiday handling.

Repro: `java TestMain.java` (plain JDK source launcher, no build tool). It covers weekday fills, holiday fills, Sunday fills, the reminder times, and chained schedules against the 2026 store calendar. Fix the planner so the whole suite passes. Do not modify TestMain.java.
